Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ghostwater]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Ghostwater is a pocket world created by the Monarch Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Ghostwater was designed to contain a research facility.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Ghostwater is a pocket world that will crumble within the next few months due to damaged anchor binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Ghostwater is a vast ocean containing a bubble of water aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Ghostwater contains a prize known only to the Akura family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 5''' — Ghostwater was supposed to have been abandoned until recently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Ghostwater is described as an icy cold ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Ghostwater has been closed for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 6''' — Ghostwater was sealed away and subsequently looted by Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Something was going wrong with Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ghostwater is a world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — Ghostwater contains treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — The construct has a measure of control over Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 9''' — Ghostwater is intact enough to last a few more months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 10''' — Supervising the entrance of Ghostwater is an Underlord assignment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Ghostwater is a location with a portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Ghostwater is an ocean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Ghostwater is a dying world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Ghostwater is a substance found in a pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon spent a month in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Ghostwater is a power that was created as an attempt to create other wells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 16''' — Ghostwater is a world that only has a few weeks left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Orthos' mind, body, and spirit were rejuvenated by his time in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 18''' — Ghostwater is a white pearl that Harmony drank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — Ghostwater is a place where the Tidewalker sect and Ninecloud Court delegation were present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 19''' — The boy on the ground drank two drops of ghostwater.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 2''' — Ghostwater is an island containing a cave with a jade doorframe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Ghostwater is a location Lindon has recently visited.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon had more items in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Eithan has found works of art in Ghostwater that were recovered from a gold dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Lindon found upgrades to his body and soul in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 7''' — Ghostwater is a location that Northstrider attempted to create transportation gates to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The group traveled from Ghostwater via cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Lindon found Underlord dream tablets in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Ghostwater is a location Lindon mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Ghostwater meat provides enhancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — Ghostwater has an owner.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — Ghostwater is a place where Dross absorbed information constructs.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon has taken a drop of ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Ghostwater is a location where Yerin and Mercy fought Sopharanatoth's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 12''' — Ghostwater is a version of Dross.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Dross was born from Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ghostwater is a location accessible via doorframes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Some Heralds were guests in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Northstrider's pocket world looks like Ghostwater in miniature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara burns ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Sophara's ghostwater was gone.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Ghostwater was formed with Archlord soulfire.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Ghostwater is an isolated new world.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Ghostwater is the world where Dross was born.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Northstrider is deeper than the wells in Ghostwater.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ghostwater is a concept Lindon envisioned for the new world.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
